title: T6 Constellation: Retire-or-fix com.appydave.omi-sync — verify retirement, restore the orphaned sync leg
prompt: com.appydave.omi-sync (launchd, 6x/day) silently failed on every run for weeks — its git pull --rebase died on unstaged changes in ~/dev/raw-intake, so OMI transcripts were never committed or pushed cross-machine. The plist was retired 2026-07-06 (loose-ends D3), but that orphaned the sync job nothing else owns: the replacement pulse (com.appydave.omi-fetch) commits locally and by design never pushes or pulls; at authoring raw-intake sat ahead 41 / behind 3 of origin with 30 stranded untracked omi/*.md transcripts. Verify the retirement is still in effect (re-execute it if it reverted), prove the pulse healthy, adopt the stranded transcripts with pathspec-fenced commits, reconcile the repo (pull --rebase --autostash, push), add a guarded push-with-catchup git_sync leg to omi-fetch's pulse.py (amending its documented never-push law, dated), truth-fix the stale 'omi-sync is live' claims in omi-fetch's README/comments, live-prove the leg with an empty-commit probe, and write the closure report at backlog/wargames/proof/T6-10/REPORT.md listing the 11 modified June-14 files left for David. Never commit or adjudicate those modified files, never blanket-add in raw-intake, never delete the retired plist or omi_sync.sh. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T6-10-omi-sync-retire-or-fix.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: launchctl print gui/$(id -u)/com.appydave.omi-sync fails with 'Could not find service' and exactly one retired plist backup exists under ~/Library/LaunchAgents/retired/ (not deleted). git -C ~/dev/raw-intake fetch && git status -sb shows main in sync with origin/main (no ahead/behind, allowing only fresh pulse commits that clear on the next pulse); ls-files --others -- omi is empty; log --grep=wg-t6-10 shows 2 commits (adoption + probe); the 11 ' M' June-14 files remain modified-uncommitted and are listed in the report. pulse.py contains def git_sync and a git_sync(errors) call site, parses clean, and omi-fetch README no longer says 'never pushes'; the omi-fetch repo commit wg-t6-10 is pushed. backlog/wargames/proof/T6-10/REPORT.md exists with retirement evidence, before/after ahead-behind numbers, and a 'left for David' section. Negative: appydave-plugins skills/omi-fetch untouched, omi_sync.sh still present, dark-factory engine/ and research/ untouched.
